blocks.heading: December 1st — Ymir Preparations
blocks.content:
As soon as you gain control of **Rean**, you'll notice the addition of **Quick Travel** under the navigation menu. Before heading out, there are a few important stops in town.

Head to the **General Store** and speak to **Raio** (the shopkeeper on the right). He'll explain the weapon synthesis system and how to unlock additional Orbment slots — the Orbment system lets you upgrade slots to equip more potent Quartz.

Next, speak to **Camillia** nearby to trigger an event scene that unlocks the **Item Trading** function (works like a pawn shop). On a second playthrough, she'll also allow trading Zemurian Ore Shards for 50 U-Materials.

Before leaving town through Ymir Canyon, visit the **Station** and speak to **Luke** near the wreckage — he provides some **Tear Balms** for the road.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-december-1 | December 1st: Left Ymir -->

blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park — High Elements
blocks.content:
After the event scene, you'll be warped into **Lunaria Nature Park**. Head south toward **Lunaria Nature Park 3**.

This area introduces **High Elements** (Time, Space, and Mirage) — these affect monsters and turn order, which can be either an advantage or a disadvantage depending on the matchup.

blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park 3 — Exploration
blocks.content: Check the **southeast corner** for a treasure chest containing a **Stone Brooch**, then the **southwest corner** for a treasure box with **Sepith Mass x100**. Take the southeast exit to continue to **Lunaria Nature Park 2**.

blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park 2 — Treasures & Fishing
blocks.content:
This area has several valuable pickups. At the **west end**, grab the **Teara Balm** from the treasure box — there's also a fishing spot nearby. At the **east end**, find a **Citrus Bottle** in a treasure chest.

Cross the bridge heading south, then check the **west corner** for a monster chest containing the **Scepter** Master Quartz (be ready for a fight). In the **east area**, pick up an **EP Charge II**.

Take the south exit to reach **Lunaria Nature Park 1**.

blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park 1 — Boss Ahead
blocks.content:
Grab the **HP 1** quartz from the treasure chest in the **northeast corner** (east side), then pick up **Sepith x100** from the **southwest corner**. In the center path heading south, you'll find an **Orbment Charging Station** — heal up fully before leaving the park, as a boss awaits at the exit.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-lunaria-complete | Lunaria Nature Park Complete -->

blocks.name: Grunoja
blocks.heading: Boss: Grunoja
blocks.strategy:
This fight introduces the **Overdrive** mechanic. Activate it by highlighting the attack icon, holding the Right button when it changes icon, and pressing Confirm. Overdrive restores HP, EP, CP, grants 3 extra turns, and allows instant magic casts between linked characters.

Buff up your characters and go on the offensive. Grunoja can buff itself, inflict **Seal** (paralyze), and hit hard with physical attacks.

**Recommendation:** Use Toval's wind magic for big damage. Have Rean use **Autumn Leaf Cutter** or **Arc Slash** to delay the boss's turns. If CP is maxed, save your S-Craft for when the boss's HP is low to finish it off quickly.

blocks.heading: West Celdic Highway & East Trista Highway
blocks.content:
After defeating Grunoja, leave the park and enter the **farmhouse on the east side**. Speak to the residents inside for an event scene. Head south and check the **southwest corner** for two treasure chests.

Take the south exit for a short scene, then head west. Pick up the treasure chest near the small tower and take the **southwest exit** to reach **East Trista Highway**. This is a very short area — grab the 3 treasure chests (including **EP Charge I**, **Earth Lance**, and **Curia Balm**) and check the fishing location to the west. Near the bridge, an event scene plays where Rean notices guards.

Return to West Celdic Highway and take the **southeast exit** to reach **Celdic**.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-highways-complete | Reached Celdic -->

blocks.heading: Treasure List: Highways
rows: EP Charge I / Earth Lance / Curia Balm

blocks.heading: Celdic — Reuniting with Friends
blocks.content:
When you enter Celdic, three key story events await (marked with red exclamation marks). Visit **Becky** at the Celdic House near the West Celdic Highway entrance, **Margot** at the Weathercock Inn (behind the counter), and **Rosine** at the Grand Market.

After speaking with all three, an event scene unfolds and Rean purchases **Imperial Chronicle Issue #2**. Read it and exit to trigger another event.

<!-- collectible: a1p1-chronicle-2 | Imperial Chronicle Issue #2 -->

Now head to the **Grand Market** and buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #2** from Cornette's shop (center of market). On a second playthrough, also grab **Black Records #2** from the same shop.

<!-- missable: a1p1-gambler-jack-2 | Gambler Jack Reprint #2 -->

Visit the **Chapel** on the west end and speak with **Moulbaix** — she teaches you the recipe for **Fresh Vegetable Juice**.

When ready, head toward **East Celdic Highway**.

blocks.heading: East Celdic Highway — Machias Joins
blocks.content:
Head **north** to locate a treasure chest containing **Silver Earrings**. Then go to the **northeast corner** and talk to **Tarim** (NPC near the farmhouse) — he gives you **Gambler Jack II Chapter 1**.

<!-- missable: a1p1-gambler-jack-ii-1 | Gambler Jack II - Chapter 1 -->

> **Note:** Collect all 14 volumes of Gambler Jack II to exchange for the strongest weapon later. If missed, they can sometimes be found via Inspect Curios (unreliable).

Check the **southeast bridge** area for a fishing spot and a treasure chest that triggers an event where Rean finds an **Old Key**. Head to the **Windmill** in the center-south area and watch the event scene — **Machias** joins your party.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-machias-joins | Machias Joined Party -->

blocks.heading: East Celdic Highway — Quests & AP
blocks.content:
Return to Celdic and visit the **Market Manager's House**. Speak to **Manager Otto** — this adds the Quest section to your Notebook and introduces the **AP (Academic Points)** system. Your goal is to max AP each chapter for **S Rank**.

While in town, visit the **Chapel** and talk to **Rosine**. She gives you 3 **Tear Balms** and adds page 1 to her profile.

blocks.name: Munch no More
blocks.content: Speak to Manager Otto in Celdic to accept. Head to **East Celdic Highway 2** (northeast corner) to find the quest monster. Defeat it and return to Manager Otto to report.
blocks.reward: Detection Quartz (displays all treasure chests on mini-map), 1500 Mira, 4 AP

blocks.name: Giant Crop Muncher
blocks.heading: Quest Boss: Giant Crop Muncher
blocks.strategy: The boss spawns with 7 Crop Muncher minions. Focus area-of-effect attacks to clear the adds first, then concentrate damage on the main target. Fire-element attacks deal bonus damage (120% efficacy). Water is slightly resisted (90%).

blocks.name: Herbal Remedies
blocks.content: Speak to **Father Zirbel** behind the altar at the **Celdic Chapel**. He needs a cure herb. Go to the **Grand Market** and speak to **Flint** (northwest stall) for information. Head to **West Celdic Highway** north near the Lunaria Nature Park entrance and speak to **Johnson** (NPC near the gate). Enter **Lunaria Nature Park** and find the **Cure Herb** at the northeast corner (near a treasure chest). Return to Father Zirbel with the herb.
blocks.reward: Teara Balm x2, Celestial Balm x2, 4 AP

blocks.heading: Advancing the Story — Party Expansion
blocks.content:
With both quests complete, exit Celdic and head to **East Celdic Highway**. Enter the **Windmill** on the south side and examine the communication device — select the **2nd choice**. Head to the rendezvous at **Point D** (East Celdic Highway 3, northeast end).

**Eliot** and **Fie** join your party here. Overdrive now works between Rean and his friends. For other character pairs, clear Trial Chests to unlock their Overdrive. The Burst function and party switching are also now available.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-party-expanded | Eliot & Fie Joined -->

blocks.heading: East Celdic Highway 3 — Trial Chest
blocks.content:
Explore the area: grab **Sepith Mass x100** from the **northeast corner**, then head to the **southwest area** for several treasure chests. Look for the **Blue Treasure Chest (Trial Chest)** — this requires your prearranged party to use Overdrive to complete.

> **Tip:** Equip a **Faint Resistant** accessory (the Citrus Bottle from Lunaria Park helps) — the trial boss uses faint-inducing attacks.

In the **southwest exit** area, defeat the monster chest for a **Gladiator Headband**. When ready, take the **southeast exit** to reach Twin Dragons Bridge.

blocks.name: Senior Bear Mole (Trial Chest)
blocks.heading: Trial Chest: Senior Bear Mole
blocks.strategy: The Senior Bear Mole uses **Hammer Swing** (knockback + faint) and **Jump Slam** (faint). Wait for the smaller moles to gather together, then use an S-Craft to wipe them out. **Machias** can inflict Petrify with Petrify Shell, and **Eliot** serves as your area attacker and healer.

blocks.heading: Twin Dragons Bridge — Waiting Lounge
blocks.content:
Head to the **Waiting Lounge** on the north side and speak to **Morize** in the northwest corner — she teaches you the **Cheese Omelet** recipe. Go near the bridge to witness a merchant arguing with a soldier (event scene). Examine the duct to advance the story and access the Garrelia Side.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-twin-dragons | Reached Twin Dragons Bridge -->

blocks.name: A Cry For Help
blocks.content:
After the merchant/soldier event at Twin Dragons Bridge, leave and head north near **East Celdic Highway 2**. Go to **East Celdic Highway 3** (near the 100 Sepith Mass chest) to find travelers being attacked by monsters. Defeat the monsters and select the **1st choice** to return to Twin Dragons Bridge.

Back at the bridge, speak to the three merchants (Left, Center, Right) in the Waiting Lounge. Then go to the east side of the building for a completion event.

blocks.heading: Garrelia Byroad — Merchant & Trials
blocks.content:
On the Garrelia side, find the **merchant under the bridge** — purchase the **Contact Lens** costume attachment here (cheaper than exchanging U-Material later). Explore the area for treasure: a **Celestial Balm** on the northwest path and a **Defense 2** quartz at the north end. Clear the **Trial Chest** here to unlock Overdrive for Eliot and Fie.

Continue to **Garrelia Byroad 2**. Pick up the **Holy Chain** from the south path treasure chest, an **EP Charge I** on the north path, and defeat the monster chest at the southeast end for a **Reaper Quartz**. The **Garrelia Fortress** entrance is to the northeast — heal at the Orbment Station and **save your game** before proceeding.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-garrelia-fortress | Reached Garrelia Fortress -->

blocks.name: Xeno & Leonidas
blocks.heading: Boss: Xeno & Leonidas (Story Battle)

stats.Objective: Reduce one boss's HP to 30% or below by turn 40 for 3 Bonus AP

blocks.strategy:
This is an unwinnable story battle — your goal is to deal as much damage as possible within 40 turns. Start with full CP on everyone.

**Strategy:** Buff Rean immediately, then unleash S-Crafts and Overdrive. Use AT Delay skills like **Arc Slash** and **Bullet Cyclone** to push back enemy turns. Keep Eliot as your main healer — watch for enemy S-Crafts that deal ~70% of your HP.

> **Trophy:** Scan the mines that appear during battle for the Battle Trophy.

Reducing either boss to 30% HP or below earns **3 AP**.

blocks.name: Drakkhen (Sword & Gun)
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Drakkhen
blocks.strategy:
Focus on one Drakkhen at a time.

**Drakkhen (Sword):** Attack the **Body** in Idle Stance, **Head** in Offensive Stance.

**Drakkhen (Gun):** Has Backup Pilot mode active. Attack the **Head** in Idle Stance, **Body** in Offensive Stance.

Victory rewards 100 Link EXP between partners.

blocks.heading: After the Battle — Garrelia Fortress
blocks.content:
After the battle, explore the **Resting Area** to the north. Speak to **Arbekker** to receive **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 2**. Talk to **Monica** at the General Store and **Munk** at the Dining area to add their profiles to your notebook. When ready, examine **Valimar** and select the 1st choice to advance the story.

<!-- missable: a1p1-gambler-jack-ii-2 | Gambler Jack II - Chapter 2 -->
<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-dec-4-start | Completed December 1st -->

**December 4th — Missable content ahead!** Purchase the **Tomato Jelly** recipe from the General Store and complete the hidden quest **Leaf it to Me** before ending the day. Bonding events with **Machias** and **Claire** add profile pages.

blocks.heading: December 4th — Bonding Events
blocks.content:
Bonding events are marked with a **yellow exclamation mark** on the map. These require **Bonding Points**, which are limited on a first playthrough — choose carefully who to spend them on.

Attending **Machias** and **Claire's** events adds pages to their profiles (relevant for completion). All bonding events grant **Link EXP +500** with that character.

blocks.heading: Bonding Event List
rows: Adds Page 1 to Profile. Link EXP +500
Adds Page 1 to Profile. Link EXP +500

blocks.heading: December 4th — Shopping & Activities
blocks.content:
Visit the **General Store** and purchase the **Tomato Jelly** recipe — this is missable if you advance the story without buying it.

<!-- missable: a1p1-tomato-jelly | Tomato Jelly Recipe -->

You can also try the **Snowboard Mini-Game** by exiting town via the southeast exit.

blocks.name: Leaf it to Me
blocks.content:
Speak to **Alf & Kiki** (the kids near the station) and choose the **1st option** (Offer assistance). Head to **Ymir Valley** to find two colored leaves:

1. **Leaf 1:** Northwest corner of Ymir Valley 1
2. **Leaf 2:** Upper southeast corner of Ymir Valley 2 (near the treasure chest)

Return to Alf & Kiki to complete the quest.

> **Trophy:** Scan the monkey-like monster in Ymir Valley for the Battle Trophy.

blocks.heading: End of Part 1
blocks.content:
Once you've completed all activities, bonding events, and quests, head to your room at the **Baron's Mansion**. Select the **1st choice** to end Part 1.

The game tallies all AP earned throughout Part 1. The **S-Rank requirement** is **35 AP total**.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-complete | Act 1 Part 1 Complete -->

blocks.heading: AP Breakdown (S-Rank: 35 AP)
rows: Fight against Xeno and Leonidas (30% HP)
